raw_consumer_statement: I have an XXXX XXXX XXXX ( AAdvantage Aviator Red Mastercard ) managed by Barclays bank. On XX/XX/2024, I noticed a charge from XXXX XXXX for {$1900.00}. I did NOT purchase anything from XXXX XXXX ( no flight, nothing ). So, assuming the charge was fraud, I disputed the charge, locked/replaced the card. I assumed that was the end of it. On XX/XX/2024, Barclays put the charge back on my credit card balance, they sent an e-letter to me stating they confirmed with XXXX the charge was legitimate, Barclays said this was for a flight though no information was or could be provided to me by Barclays substantiating this. So, I called XXXX XXXX to see if I could get a " refund '' for a flight I neither purchased nor took. XXXX did tell me there was a flight from XXXX departing XX/XX/2024 under my name ( XXXX XXXX ) but no one actually got on that flight. Neither XXXX nor Barclays will refund or cancel the charge for a flight I never purchased. Again, Barclays manages this card for XXXX XXXX so someone at either company should be able to remediate but they are not. Right now, I have to pay this fraudulent or erroneous charge to protect my credit score. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) with a family and can not afford to have money stolen from me by large wealthy mega-corporations.
